schema_purpose: Minimum metadata required to evaluate whether a generated artifact can be exactly regenerated.

required_fields.definition: Exact code/generator version for the artifact.
required_fields.value_guidance: Use git commit SHA or package version for the code that generated the artifact.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.definition: Hash of effective configuration used to generate the artifact.
required_fields.value_guidance: Hash the effective runtime configuration, inputs and materially relevant defaults.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.definition: Seed or seed plan for stochastic generation.
required_fields.value_guidance: Record integer seed, seed-plan artifact, or explicit not_applicable_deterministic.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.value_guidance: Record real-data source ID/date range or synthetic upstream artifact ID.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.definition: Version of ticker universe and metadata.
required_fields.value_guidance: Record ticker universe version and exchange metadata source/date.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.value_guidance: Record scenario/regime calendar artifact and generator version.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.definition: Scenario profile/day IDs represented in the artifact.
required_fields.value_guidance: Record scenario profile/day IDs or explicit not_applicable_observed_real_sample.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.value_guidance: Record cost schedule artifact/version or explicit not_applicable_no_execution_costs.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.value_guidance: Record feed/execution latency model artifact/version or explicit not_applicable_no_latency_model.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.

required_fields.value_guidance: Record generated_utc in UTC ISO-8601 format.
required_fields.allowed_missing_policy: Do not omit. Use an explicit not_applicable_* value only when the concept truly does not apply.
